# linux-only

[![Test](https://img.shields.io/github/actions/workflow/status/BlueLua/linux-only/test.yml?branch=main&label=test&style=flat-square)](https://github.com/BlueLua/linux-only/actions/workflows/test.yml)
[![LuaRocks](https://img.shields.io/luarocks/v/BlueLua/linux-only?color=blue&style=flat-square)](https://luarocks.org/modules/BlueLua/linux-only)
![Lua Versions](https://img.shields.io/badge/lua-5.1%20%7C%205.2%20%7C%205.3%20%7C%205.4%20%7C%205.5%20%7C%20LuaJIT-blue?style=flat-square)
![Platform](https://img.shields.io/badge/platform-linux-blue?style=flat-square)
[![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-MIT-blue?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/BlueLua/linux-only/blob/main/LICENSE)

Lua library.

## ✨ Features

- **Multiple Lua Versions**: Compatible with LuaJIT, Lua 5.1, 5.2, 5.3, 5.4, and
  5.5.

## 📦 Installation

```sh
luarocks install linux-only
```

## 🚀 Usage

```lua
local linux_only = require "linux-only"
```
